footer.brandDescription: Dedicated to providing world-class Japanese medical services to patients worldwide.

services.title: Featured Medical Services

checkup.title: Comprehensive Health Screening (Ningen Dock)

referral.description: Direct access to Japan's top university hospitals with expert treatment plans and medical visa assistance.

stemCell.title: Stem Cell Regenerative Therapy

pharmacy.subtitle: Comprehensive guide to Japan's high-quality prescription and OTC medications.

eve.name: EVE Quick Pain Relief
eve.description: Fast-acting headache and fever relief, gentle on the stomach.

takeda.name: Takeda Blood Pressure Medication (Example)
takeda.description: Long-term blood pressure control, prescription required.

taisho.name: Taisho Cold Medicine
taisho.description: Effective relief for multiple cold symptoms, a household essential.

nmn.name: High-Purity NMN Capsules
nmn.description: Cutting-edge anti-aging supplement, made in Japan.

cases.title: Medical Cases & Achievements
cases.subtitle: Real medical data supporting every life-changing outcome.

cancer.summary: Mr. Zhang (55, Chinese), early-stage gastric lesion discovered during comprehensive screening, endoscopic resection performed within the same week...
